title: ADP Glo Max measuring ATP13A2 ATPase activity in microsomes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cmn6s","text":"Measuring ATP13A2 ATPase activity in microsomes using commercial luminescence-based ADP detection assay (ADP Glo Max; Promega)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"5l3am","text":"Luminescence-based ADP detection assay (ADP Glo Max assay; Promega)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"62cld","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ajjq","text":"Reaction Buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fljgb","text":"50 mM MOPS-KOH pH 7.0","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aej44","text":"100 mM KCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bj3vr","text":"11 mM MgCl2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":10,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4paa4","text":"1 mM DTT","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5kvn7","text":"0.02% DDM","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4fdsu","text":"0.001-10 mM spermine","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Use 1 μg microsomes per reaction (1 µL of 5 mg/mL stock)
Dilute to 4 µL in Reaction Buffer at 4C
Equilibrate microsomes in reaction buffer for 01:30:00 On ice and for 00:10:00 at 37 °C
Add 1 µL of 25 mM ATP (final concentration 5 mM ATP) to start reaction (total reaction volume 5 µL)
Incubate for 00:15:00 at 37 °C upon addition of ATP
Terminate reaction by heating samples for 00:05:00 at 80 °C
Mix with 5 µL of ADP-Glo Reagent for 60-80 min at 23 °C
Mix with 10 uL of ADP-Glo Max Detection Reagent for 01:00:00
Measure luminescence in 384 multi-well plate using a luminometer (NOVOstar; BMG Labtech)
creator: Sue Sim
